ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the player plays in (e.g. American League, National League) */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Batting and throwing handedness */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Overall draft pick number */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Current contract status */,
  "contract_expiration" INTEGER /* Year the current contract expires */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Current annual salary */,
  "agent" TEXT /* Player's agent */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)
column_names: League the player plays in (e.g. American League, National League)
Date of birth of the player
Height of the player in inches
Weight of the player in pounds
Round in which the player was drafted
Timestamp when the player record was created
Timestamp when the player record was last updated
